policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="ipAllowed" value="@{
      try {
        var rawIp = context.Request.IpAddress;
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(rawIp)) return false;
        var clientIp = System.Net.IPAddress.Parse(rawIp);
        if (clientIp.AddressFamily != System.Net.Sockets.AddressFamily.InterNetwork) return false;
        var cidrs = ((string)context.Variables["allowedCidrs"]).Split(';');
        foreach (var entry in cidrs) {
          var cidr = entry.Trim();
          if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(cidr)) continue;
          var slash = cidr.IndexOf('/');
          if (slash < 0) {
            if (cidr == rawIp) return true;
            continue;
          }
          var networkAddr = System.Net.IPAddress.Parse(cidr.Substring(0, slash));
          int prefixLen = int.Parse(cidr.Substring(slash + 1));
          if (prefixLen == 0) return true;
          var nb = networkAddr.GetAddressBytes();
          var cb = clientIp.GetAddressBytes();
          if (nb.Length != 4 || cb.Length != 4) continue;
          uint mask = 0xFFFFFFFFu << (32 - prefixLen);
          uint netInt = ((uint)nb[0] << 24) | ((uint)nb[1] << 16) | ((uint)nb[2] << 8) | nb[3];
          uint cipInt = ((uint)cb[0] << 24) | ((uint)cb[1] << 16) | ((uint)cb[2] << 8) | cb[3];
          if ((cipInt & mask) == (netInt & mask)) return true;
        }
        return false;
      } catch {
        return false;
      }
    }" />
    
      
        
          
          
            application/json
          
          {"error":{"code":"403","message":"Access denied: IP address not allowed"}}
        
      
    

    
    
      
      
        https://login.microsoftonline.com/{{tenant-id}}/v2.0
        https://sts.windows.net/{{tenant-id}}/
      
      
        
      
    

    
    
    
    

    
    
    
      
        
          
          
            application/json
          
          {"error":{"code":"403","message":"Access denied: User not authorized"}}

set-variable.name: responseBody
deploymentName

trace.message: @{ return new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject( new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("event", "llm-api-call"), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("requestId", context.Variables["requestId"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("timestamp", context.Variables["requestTimestamp"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("oid", context.Variables["oid"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("upn", context.Variables["upn"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("tenantId", context.Variables["claimTid"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("httpStatus", context.Response.StatusCode), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("durationMs", context.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("promptTokens", context.Variables["promptTokens"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("completionTokens", context.Variables["completionTokens"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("totalTokens", context.Variables["totalTokens"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("modelName", context.Variables["llmModel"]), new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("deploymentName", context.Variables["deploymentName"]) ).ToString(); }
